data.title: Motorsport Games Announces Adjournment of Annual Meeting of Shareholders Due to Lack of Quorum
data.description: Motorsport Games Inc. (NASDAQ: MSGM), based in Miramar, Fla., shared that its annual shareholder meeting held on April 21, 2026, was reconvened and adjourned at 11:00 a.m. Eastern Time. The meeting, focusing on the racing game developer's operations, could not proceed as planned due to not meeting the necessary quorum.

data.title: GRAIL to Present New Data From NHS-Galleri and PATHFINDER 2 at 2026 ASCO Annual Meeting
data.description: New findings from the NHS-Galleri trial and PATHFINDER 2 study will be disclosed in upcoming oral presentations. These late-breaking abstracts will unveil comprehensive results from the trials, encompassing data from over 174,000 participants collectively. The large participant pool signifies a robust and extensive research effort, aimed at advancing our understanding of the subjects under investigation.

data.title: Weatherford Announces First Quarter 2026 Results
data.description: Non-GAAP refers to financial measures that exclude certain items to provide a clearer understanding of an organization's performance. This reconciliation helps stakeholders compare the organization's financial performance according to Generally Accepted Accounting Principles (GAAP) with the Non-GAAP figures. By excluding specific items, Non-GAAP measures aim to present a more accurate depiction of the company's financial health, facilitating better decision-making for investors, analysts, and other interested parties.

data.title: Primoris Services Corporation Schedules First Quarter 2026 Earnings Conference Call and Webcast
data.description: Primoris Services Corporation (NYSE: PRIM) scheduled to disclose its first quarter 2026 financial outcomes on May 5, 2026, post market closure. The press release will be uploaded to www.prim.com. Following this, a conference call and webcast will be conducted by management on May 6, 2026, at 9:00 a.m. U.S. Central Time (10:00 a.m. U.S. Eastern Time) to address the Company's performance.

data.title: Coeur Mining, Inc. Announces Expiration and Final Results of Previously Announced Exchange Offer and Consent Solicitation for New Gold Senior Notes
data.description: Coeur Mining, Inc. revealed the outcomes of its private exchange offer to certain Eligible Holders, concerning the US$400,000,000 aggregate principal amount of 6.875% Senior Notes due 2032 issued by New Gold Inc. The offer was made for all outstanding Existing Notes. The company, listed on NYSE and TSX under the symbol CDE, informed about the completion of this Exchange Offer. The Senior Notes in question carry a 6.875% interest rate and are due in 2032. The CUSIP numbers for these notes are 644535 AJ5 / C62944 AE0, while the ISIN numbers are US644535AJ57 / USC62944AE04.

data.title: Toll Brothers to Acquire Private Home Builder in Northwest Arkansas
data.description: Luxury home builder Toll Brothers, Inc. (NYSE:TOL) recently disclosed its plan to purchase most assets of Buffington Homes of Arkansas, a private home builder situated in Fayetteville, Arkansas. The agreement, set to be finalized in Toll Brothers' fiscal third quarter, signifies a significant move in the industry. Toll Brothers is set to solidify its position as the leading luxury home builder in the nation with this strategic acquisition.

data.title: ProstACT Global Phase 3 (Part 1) Selected as Late-Breaking Abstract at ASCO 2026
data.description: Telix Pharmaceuticals Limited disclosed safety and tolerability findings from the ProstACT Global Phase 3 study (Part 1) in an announcement made on April 22, 2026. The data will be shared through a late-breaking oral presentation at the 2026 American Society of Clinical Oncology (ASCO) Annual Meeting scheduled from May 29 to June 2, 2026, in Chicago, IL. Telix operates under the stock symbols ASX: TLX and NASDAQ: TLX. This marks a significant step in presenting vital research insights to the global medical community.

data.description: WESTBURY, N.Y., 21st April 2026 - Kensington Capital Acquisition Corp. VI (NYSE: KCAC.U) revealed that starting 24th April 2026, investors who purchased units in the Company's IPO, which consisted of 23,000,000 units and closed on 5th March 2026, will have the option to...

data.title: United Airlines Stock Slips As Softer 2026 Outlook Overshadows Q1 Earnings Beat
data.description: United Airlines Holdings Inc recently released their first-quarter financial results, with revenue standing at $14.61 billion, surpassing the expected $14.34 billion. The company also reported adjusted earnings of $1.19 per share, exceeding analyst forecasts of $1.10 per share. Total operating revenue saw a 10.6% increase compared to the previous year. Revenue from Premium Cabin flights rose by 14%, Basic Economy by 7%, and Loyalty by 13%, while Cargo revenue declined by 1.6%. Capacity increased by 3.4% year-over-year. The stock for United Airlines Holdings is currently facing resistance in the market.
FS Bancorp, Inc. Reports First Quarter Net Income of $7.8 Million or $1.02 Per Diluted Share and Declares 53rd Consecutive Quarterly Cash Dividend

data.title: Charlton Aria Acquisition Corporation Announces Receipt of Nasdaq Notice Regarding Delinquent Filing of Annual Report on Form 10-K
data.description: Charlton Aria Acquisition Corporation (Nasdaq: CHARU), based in Wilmington, DE, received notification from Nasdaq regarding non-compliance with Nasdaq Listing Rule 5250(c)(1) for failing to timely file its Annual Report on Form 10-K for the fiscal year ended December 31, 2025. This could impact the Company's listing on The Nasdaq Global Market but currently does not affect trading of its securities. The Company, a Cayman Islands exempted entity, disclosed this information to the public on April 21, 2026.

data.title: Intuitive Surgical Delivers Q1 Double Beat: ISRG Earnings Highlights
data.description: Intuitive Surgical Inc (NASDAQ: ISRG) released its first-quarter 2026 financial results on Tuesday after the market closed. The company reported revenue of $2.77 billion, surpassing analyst expectations of $2.62 billion. Additionally, adjusted earnings for the quarter were $2.50 per share, exceeding analyst predictions of $2.10 per share. Total revenue saw a 23% increase year-over-year, attributed to higher procedure volume, more da Vinci system placements, and growth in the da Vinci and Ion system installed base. Instruments and accessories revenue rose to $1.69 billion from $1.37 billion in the previous year's quarter. Intuitive Surgical shares are currently in the spotlight and the market is closely watching their trajectory.

data.title: M&T Bank Corporation Announces Second Quarter Dividends
data.description: Buffalo-based M&T Bank Corporation has recently disclosed a quarterly cash dividend of $1.50 per share for its common stock. Shareholders as of record on June 1 will receive the dividend on June 30, 2026. M&T, listed on the NYSE under MTB, made this announcement on April 21, 2026.

data.title: Company now has $62B in Bitcoin; reveals largest BTC purchases. How Strategy acquired its record-breaking stash explained.
data.description: An overview of Michael Saylor's company's accumulation of Bitcoin and the strategies behind its record-breaking growth.

data.title: GitLab Collaborates with AWS to Bring Agentic DevSecOps to Enterprise Teams Using Their Existing Amazon Bedrock Accounts and Spend
data.description: In San Francisco, GitLab Inc. unveiled an enhanced partnership with Amazon Web Services (AWS) for increased collaboration. This integration allows customers to utilize GitLab Duo Agent Platform inference alongside Amazon Bedrock, enabling more efficient DevSecOps through Amazon Bedrock models, IAM policies, and AWS spending commitments. With AI agents producing additional code, merge requests, and pipeline activity, enterprises can benefit from streamlined operations and governance.

data.title: Interactive Brokers Stock Slips After Q1 Report: Here's Why
data.description: Interactive Brokers Group Inc. (NASDAQ: IBKR) released their first-quarter financial results, falling short of revenue expectations. The company reported earnings of 60 cents per share, meeting analyst predictions. However, quarterly revenue was $1.67 billion, missing the estimated $1.71 billion by 2.25%. In comparison to the same period last year, the following highlights were noted: customer accounts rose by 31% to 4.75 million, customer equity increased by 38% to $789.4 billion, and total DARTs increased by 24% to 4.37 million. For full details, refer to the article on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Five Years in the Making: Alex & Mor: A Love Odyssey Premieres Exclusively on Mometu April 24
data.description: On April 21, 2026, Mometu, a streaming service that supports independent and underrepresented films, revealed the exclusive debut of "Alex & Mor: A Love Odyssey," the first feature film by director Tim Glover. This film will only be accessible on the platform and caters to audiences interested in niche cinema.
